title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Cafe Coffee Day
jsonLd.description:
Cafe Coffee Day is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cafe Coffee Day:
Cafe Coffee Day is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cafe Coffee Day!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
